description: Creative fullstack developer from SMK Negeri 1 Cimahi who builds end-to-end web products with Laravel, React, Tailwind, relational databases, and polished UI details. I enjoy creating systems that are strong behind the scenes and interfaces that feel light, clean, and enjoyable to use.
